headline: Entrepreneurship: From Idea to Scalable Business
description: Entrepreneurship transforms innovations into viable businesses. Lean Startup methodology, business model canvas, and venture capital form the modern entrepreneurial ecosystem.

citation.name: The Lean Startup: How Constant Innovation Creates Radically Successful Businesses (2025 15th Anniversary Edition)
citation.author: Ries E.

citation.name: Zero to One: Notes on Startups (2025 Updated Edition)
citation.author: Thiel P., Masters B.
